---
title: "Air India Flight AI171 Crash"
date: 2025-06-12
location: "Ahmedabad"
category: "other"
status: "no-action"
deaths: 260
injured: 1
accused_count: 0
accused_gap: "No accused named in the frozen sources."
summary: "Air India Flight AI171, a Boeing 787-8 operating from Ahmedabad to Gatwick, crashed at Ahmedabad on 12 June 2025. The AAIB preliminary report lists fatality counts of 12 crew, 229 passengers, and 19 others, and one serious injury, while Reuters' graphics coverage says the crash killed 241 people on board and 19 on the ground, with one passenger surviving. A June 2026 Outlook India follow-up said new simulator data and timeline details in the AAIB report point to systems failure rather than pilot error, and a 20 June 2026 Business Standard headline said the pilots' body raised questions and sought simulator tests in the AI-171 crash probe."
tags: ["air-india", "ai171", "ahmedabad", "aviation"]
last_updated: 2026-06-23

accused: []

compensation:
  announced: false
  announced_amount: ""
  paid: "none"
  paid_note: "The frozen sources do not mention compensation."
  source: ""

timeline:
  - date: 2025-06-12
    type: "red"
    event: "The AAIB preliminary report says Air India's B787-8 VT-ANB was operating Flight AI171 from Ahmedabad to Gatwick."
    source: "https://www.aaib.gov.in/What%27s%20New%20Assets/Preliminary%20Report%20VT-ANB.pdf"
    source_name: "AAIB preliminary report"
  - date: 2025-06-12
    type: "red"
    event: "The AAIB injuries table records 12 crew fatalities, 229 passenger fatalities, and 19 other fatalities, with one passenger listed as seriously injured."
    source: "https://www.aaib.gov.in/What%27s%20New%20Assets/Preliminary%20Report%20VT-ANB.pdf"
    source_name: "AAIB preliminary report"
  - date: 2025-06-12
    type: "gray"
    event: "Reuters' illustrated timeline says the crash near Ahmedabad airport killed 241 people on board and 19 on the ground, and that just one passenger survived."
    source: "https://www.reuters.com/graphics/INDIA-CRASH/TIMELINE/xmvjelqwlpr/"
    source_name: "Reuters"

    source_name: "Outlook India via Google News"

    type: "gray"

    source: "https://news.google.?oc=5"
    source_name: "Business Standard via Google News"
---

## Evidence map

- `title` → AAIB prelim report identifies the incident as "Air India's B787-8 aircraft bearing registration VT-ANB at Ahmedabad on 12 June 2025" and as Flight AI171.
- `date` → AAIB prelim report gives the accident date as 12 June 2025.
- `location` → AAIB prelim report and Reuters both anchor the crash at Ahmedabad.
- `deaths` → computed total from the AAIB fatality table values 12 + 229 + 19 = 260.
- `injured` → AAIB table includes "Serious NIL 1".
- `summary` → AAIB and Reuters support the crash, route, fatalities, and lone-survivor framing; the June 2026 Outlook India headline adds that new simulator data and timelines in the AAIB report point to systems failure, not pilot error, and the 20 June 2026 Business Standard headline adds that the pilots' body raised questions and sought simulator tests.
- `accused_count` / `accused` → no accused are named in the frozen sources.
- `compensation` → the frozen sources do not mention compensation.
- `status` → no accused are named in the frozen sources, so the record stays no-action.
- `timeline` → added 2026-06-19 and 2026-06-20 gray entries for the Outlook India and Business Standard follow-ups on AAIB simulator data, timeline details, and simulator-test questions.

Notes:
- AAIB source text froze the incident identity, flight number, location, and fatality/injury table.
- Reuters source text froze the same crash identity plus the on-board / ground casualty summary and lone survivor detail.
- The June 2026 Outlook India and Business Standard follow-ups were frozen from Google News wrapper headlines because the wrappers did not expose the article bodies in plain text in this environment.
